AGRRules.GeneralRules1: Asgardian Rising is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on the top of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring increasing multiplier reels.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

AGRRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

AGRCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
AGRCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
AGRCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
AGRCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
AGRCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

AGRWildsOnTheWay.Title: Wilds-on-the-Way
AGRWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
AGRWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
AGRWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.

AGRMultiplierReel.Title: Multiplier Reel
AGRMultiplierReel.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the multipliers below reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 will be set as inactive with a multiplier of x1.
AGRMultiplierReel.MultiplierExplaination2: At any round after wins are paid, any winning symbol in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 will either set the respective reel's multiplier to active (if the multiplier is inactive) or increase the respective reel's multiplier value by 1 (if the multiplier is active).
AGRMultiplierReel.MultiplierExplaination3: All wins will be multiplied by the current total sum of the active multipliers' values.

AGRFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
AGRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
AGRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of every free spin, the multipliers below reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 will be set as active with a multiplier of x2.
AGRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: At any round after wins are paid, any winning symbol in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 will increase the respective reel's multiplier value by 2.
